title: crataegus viridis var. nitens
intro: Crataegus viridis var. nitens, also known as the green hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn plant, which is a deciduous shrub or small tree with showy white flowers and red berries. The green hawthorn has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardio-protective effects. Its health benefits include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Crataegus viridis var. nitens include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be made by infusing the flowers, leaves, or berries in hot water or a solvent, and are often used to promote overall well-being and prevent chronic diseases.
